title: Israel strikes 150 Hezbollah sites in 48 hours — weapons depots, command centers, rocket launchers
snippet: IDF announced strikes on approximately 150 Hezbollah positions across southern Lebanon over 48 hours. Targets: weapons depots, command centers, rocket launchers. Lebanese President Aoun condemned 'ongoing, unpunished attacks on Lebanon' despite ceasefire agreement widely regarded as defunct.
tag_reason: New specific military data point — 150 strikes in 48h first reported
